title: Inside the White House’s cheeky ‘Aliens.gov’ website as UFO files are slowly released: ‘They walk among us’
description: THE White House has launched a tongue-in-cheek new website called Aliens.gov - but visitors hoping for little green men will be disappointed. While the name suggests a deep dive into the cosmos, the government has a much more grounded objective for the platform. It is actually a new tool for monitoring specific law enforcement data,...

title: Winners and Losers: Spielberg’s UFO Clash and Tom Hardy’s Trailer Tantrums
description: Steven Spielberg's 'Disclosure Day' gets buzz. Tom Hardy cannot be bothered. Miles Teller discovers the Streisand effect. Kane Parsons and Curry Barker gang up on Grogu. AI makes history (again) as we look at who won and lost the week.

title: Winners and Losers: Spielberg’s UFO Clash and Tom Hardy’s Trailer Tantrums
description: LOSER: Tom Hardy: Find somebody who loves you the way this man loves a Star Waggon. The actor’s alleged behavior on the MobLand set — refusing to come out of his portable abode for hours at a time, holding up production — is doubly damaging PR because it’s the same thing he was previously called [...] The post Winners and Losers: Spielberg’s UFO Clash and Tom Hardy’s Trailer Tantrums appeared first on NYT News Today .

title: Spielberg's 'Disclosure Day': A Hypnotic UFO Thriller That Disarms Your Soul
description: Early reactions to Steven Spielberg's upcoming sci-fi film 'Disclosure Day' praise its captivating narrative, exceptional performances, and masterful blend of suspense, humor, and emotion. The film is set to release in the US on June 12, 2026.
